description_long: This oven features a retro-inspired design with a soft green exterior and gold metallic accents. The front showcases a prominent oven door with a triangular window and gold handle, as well as a lower drawer with a matching gold pull. The oven stands on four curved legs, giving it a classic, elevated appearance. The top surface is flat and black, bordered by a raised back panel that houses three round gold control knobs. The sides and back are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the oven's solid, monolithic form. The overall look is both decorative and functional, suitable for vintage or stylized urban environments.
description: A vintage-style green oven with gold accents, curved legs, and a black top surface, featuring a front windowed door and three gold control knobs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the oven door with a triangular window, gold handle, lower drawer, and three gold knobs on the top back panel.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the smooth green surface, curved legs, and the edge of the black top with visible gold knobs.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain green back panel with no visible features or controls.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the smooth green surface, curved legs, and the three gold knobs on the top back panel.
attribute_control_panel_design: The control panel is located on the raised back section of the oven's top surface and features three round gold knobs arranged in a horizontal row. There are no visible labels, digital displays, or additional controls. The design is minimalistic and relies on the metallic finish for visual distinction.
attribute_door_handle_type: The oven door handle is a horizontally mounted, protruding gold bar with rounded ends, attached to the upper section of the oven door. It appears metallic and is designed for easy gripping, with a decorative, classic style.
attribute_window_presence: present; the oven door has a triangular window with rounded corners, centrally placed on the door, allowing a view into the oven's interior.
